################################################
# Relic Density                                #
################################################

Omegah2                       = 1.20e-01
Omegah_Planck                 = 1.20e-01
xsi                           = 1.00e+00 	 # xsi = (Omega/Omega_Planck)
x_f                           = 2.50e+01
sigmav_xf                     = 4.21e-27 	 # cm^3 s^-1
# % of the relic density channels
%_chichibar_bbx               = 40.00 %
%_chichibar_ttx               = 10.00 %
%_chi1psi1_bbx                = 30.00 %
%_chi1psi1_ttx                = 20.00 %
